AccessGrantRequest.description: Grant/extend a corp's access. Omitted/null `expires_at` = perpetual.
AccessGrantRequest.title: AccessGrantRequest

AccountingAccessOut.description:
A corp's accounting-access status plus how to pay (manager-visible). When no
operator wallet is connected (`payment_configured` False), the UI shows status
only — there is nowhere to send ISK yet.
AccountingAccessOut.title: AccountingAccessOut

AppraisalCreateRequest.description:
Items may be supplied structured, as a raw EVE paste, or both — but at least
one must be non-empty. The paste is parsed and name-resolved server-side. The
combined item count (structured + paste) is capped in the use case; the bounds
here are the cheap first line of defense (ADR-0014, EVE's 1000-item contract).
AppraisalCreateRequest.title: AppraisalCreateRequest

BillingSettingsOut.description: The access price the instance charges (ADR-0042).
BillingSettingsOut.title: BillingSettingsOut

BillingSettingsUpdate.description: Set the access price. Must buy something: at least 1 ISK per period.
BillingSettingsUpdate.title: BillingSettingsUpdate

CorpAccessOut.description: One corp's access to the accounting add-on, as shown on the admin page.
CorpAccessOut.title: CorpAccessOut

CorpMemberOut.description: A corp member matched by the manager-designation search.
CorpMemberOut.title: CorpMemberOut

HangarOut.description:
One configured buyback hangar (ADR-0044): a drop-off location + a corp hangar
division whose contents count as buyback stock.
HangarOut.title: HangarOut

InventoryLotOut.description:
One open purchase of the item: what's left of it, what one unit is carried
at, and how long it has been sitting.
InventoryLotOut.title: InventoryLotOut

LocationCreateRequest.description:
Add a drop-off location. For an NPC station the name is resolved server-side
from the SDE (any supplied name is ignored); for a structure — which has no SDE —
the name from the structure search is required.
LocationCreateRequest.title: LocationCreateRequest

OperatorWalletStatus.description: The operator wallet connection (ADR-0042), as shown on the admin page.
OperatorWalletStatus.title: OperatorWalletStatus

PaymentMatchRequest.description: Apply an unmatched payment to a corporation (by EVE corp id).
PaymentMatchRequest.title: PaymentMatchRequest

PaymentOut.description: One incoming ISK transfer seen in the operator's wallet (ADR-0042).
PaymentOut.title: PaymentOut

ReprocessBreakdownOut.description:
How a reprocess-priced ore line breaks down (ADR-0026): the minerals it yields
plus any sub-batch leftover priced at the ore's own market price.
ReprocessBreakdownOut.title: ReprocessBreakdownOut

RosterStatusOut.description: The corp roster's sync state, shown on the Config panel + Managers page.
RosterStatusOut.title: RosterStatusOut

RulePutRequest.description:
The full rule state for a target (the target comes from the URL). `PUT` is an
idempotent create-or-replace, so this is the complete representation — omitting
the hub fields clears any hub override (ADR-0031).
RulePutRequest.title: RulePutRequest

SessionUser.description: The authenticated user returned by /me and /login (API DTO).
SessionUser.title: SessionUser

StructureAuthorizeRequest.description: The OAuth callback payload completing the structure-access grant.
StructureAuthorizeRequest.title: StructureAuthorizeRequest

StructureAuthorizeResponse.description: The SSO URL the SPA redirects to, to grant structure-market access.
StructureAuthorizeResponse.title: StructureAuthorizeResponse

StructureSearchResult.description: A structure the authorizing character can access, matched by name.
StructureSearchResult.title: StructureSearchResult

StructureTokenStatus.description: The corp's structure-market authorization status (never the token itself).
StructureTokenStatus.title: StructureTokenStatus

get.description: All registered corps with their accounting-access status (cross-tenant).

schema.title: Response List Corp Access Api V1 Admin Access Get

put.description: Grant or extend a corp's access (`source=admin`); null expiry = perpetual.
Set the access price (applies to checkout and all future payment matching).

get.description:
Recent incoming payments (newest first); `?unmatched=true` filters to the ones
awaiting a manual match.

schema.title: Response List Payments Api V1 Admin Payments Get

post.description:
Apply an unmatched payment to a corp (extends their access by the periods the
amount covers).
Begin the operator wallet grant: mint state + PKCE, return the SSO URL.
Complete the grant: validate state, exchange the code, store the token.

schema.title: Response List Appraisals Api V1 Appraisals Get

post.description:
Open the appraisal's matched contract in the caller's own EVE client (ADR-0038),
using the login refresh token held encrypted in their session.

Begin login: mint state + PKCE (stashed in the session) and return the EVE
authorization URL for the SPA to redirect to.

delete.description: Log out: clear the session cookie.

post.description: Complete login: validate the OAuth state, exchange the code, open a session.

schema.title: Response List Hangars Api V1 Corporations Me Accounting Hangars Get
Response List Locations Api V1 Corporations Me Locations Get
Response List Managers Api V1 Corporations Me Managers Get

get.description: Search the synced roster by name (empty until the corp roster has been synced).

schema.title: Response Search Members Api V1 Corporations Me Roster Members Get

post.description: Manually re-pull the roster with the stored token (rate-limited; 429 if too soon).

schema.title: Response List Rules Api V1 Corporations Me Rules Get

put.description:
Create or replace the rule for a target (idempotent). 201 on create, 200 on
replace.

post.description: Begin the corp ESI access grant: mint state + PKCE and return the SSO URL.

get.description: Search the corp's accessible structures by name (requires prior authorization).

schema.title: Response Search Api V1 Corporations Me Structure Token Search Get

post.description:
Complete the grant: validate state, exchange the code, store the token, and
best-effort populate the roster (works if the connected character can read it).

get.description: Liveness + DB connectivity check (proves the two halves talk).

schema.title: Response Health Api V1 Health Get
Response List Market Groups Api V1 Market Groups Get

get.description: Search seeded NPC stations by system or station name, for the hub picker.

schema.title: Response Search Stations Api V1 Stations Search Get
Response Search Types Api V1 Types Search Get

get.description: The app version (bumped per merged PR). Public — shown in the UI footer.

schema.title: Response Version Api V1 Version Get
